name: MERCADOLIBRE INC
business: MercadoLibre is the leading online commerce and fintech ecosystem in Latin America, providing an integrated platform including the Mercado Libre Marketplace (e-commerce), Mercado Pago (fintech payments and financial services), Mercado Envios (logistics), Mercado Ads (advertising), and Mercado Libre Classifieds. It serves consumers and merchants in 18 countries for e-commerce and 8 countries for fintech.
sellsTo: MSMEs (micro, small and medium-sized enterprises) underserved by traditional financial institutions

exposures.sentence: Our e-commerce platform is the leader in the region based on gross merchandise volume (GMV), and our fintech platform is the leader in monthly active users (MAUs) among fintech companies in Argentina, Chile and Mexico, and the second largest in Brazil.
Beyond facilitating Marketplace transactions, over the years we have expanded our array of Mercado Pago services to third parties outside Mercado Libre's Marketplace.
Mercado Envios is a logistics solution that is one of the value-added services that we offer to our sellers and buyers on our platform.
Insurance products such as extended warranties, personal accident cover, theft and damage policies, among others

We continue to scale Mercado Play, an advertising-based video on demand (AVOD) streaming service first launched in 2023 and available to all users in Argentina, Brazil, Mexico, Colombia, Chile, Peru and Uruguay.
Generative AI (GenAI) adoption at MercadoLibre has continued to expand across the organization.

catalysts.sentence: Mercado Shops was discontinued as of December 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: Mercado Play made available on connected TVs
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, Mercado Play previously available only through our apps, was made available on connected TVs for the first time.

catalysts.event: BMA issued Class M Digital Asset Business licenses for Meli Dólar
catalysts.sentence: on August 18, 2025, the BMA issued the corresponding Class M Digital Asset Business licenses, thus authorizing Meli ISAC Ltd. to issue, sell or redeem digital assets, and authorizing Meli ISA Ltd. to operate as a digital assets service vendor.

catalysts.event: Meli Dólar business migration to Bermuda completed
catalysts.sentence: On September 22, 2025, the migration of the Meli Dólar business from Uruguay to Bermuda was successfully completed under the Class M Digital Asset Business licenses and operations under this new regulatory framework commenced.

catalysts.event: Filed application for banking license in Argentina
catalysts.sentence: On June 17, 2025, we filed an application with the CBA to obtain a banking license in Argentina for a new entity to be incorporated, which will be controlled by the subsidiaries Meli Participaciones, S.L. and Marketplace Investments, LLC.

catalysts.event: Submitted authorization request for investment funds management company in Mexico
catalysts.sentence: On March 27, 2025, MPFS, S. de R.L. de C.V. submitted to the CNBV an authorization request to organize and operate as an investment funds management company through Mercado Pago Fondos, S.A. de C.V., Sociedad Operadora de Fondos de Inversión (a new subsidiary to be legally formed when the authorization request is approved).

catalysts.event: Submitted authorization request for multiple banking institution in Mexico
catalysts.sentence: On September 11, 2024, MercadoLibre, S.A., de C.V., Institución de Fondos de Pago Electrónico submitted to the CNBV an authorization request to organize and operate as a multiple banking institution.

tamClaims.claim: Latin America has a population of over 650 million people with e-commerce penetration significantly lagging benchmarks.
tamClaims.sentence: Our e-commerce platform provides buyers and sellers with a robust and safe environment that fosters the development of a large e-commerce community in Latin America, a region with a population of over 650 million people where penetration of e-commerce over total retail significantly lags benchmarks such as the United States of America (U.S.), the United Kingdom (U.K.) and China.
